overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rainfall. The scene features towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, wet reflective streets, and pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The footage appears to be from a video game engine with cinematic neon-drenched aesthetics reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive curved overpass structure that provides partial shelter from the rain. The environment is dimly lit with mixed lighting from neon signs in the distance, and pedestrians with umbrellas walk ahead on the wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open avenue with corporate towers and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet avenue toward the distant intersection, passing modern street lamps

notable_agents.action: standing near the railing looking out at the street

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open avenue with the PETROCHEM corporate building dominating the right side with its bright signage. The street is wet with reflections of neon lights, and pedestrians are scattered along the walkway moving in the same direction.

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide intersection in the downtown area with moderate pedestrian traffic. The camera looks upward revealing a massive blue holographic fish swimming through the misty air between skyscrapers, while the PETROCHEM building recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with holographic advertisements and reflective pools

events.description: large orange holographic fish appears swimming overhead, replacing the blue one in prominence

agents.ego_description: looking up at the holographic fish advertisements and turning to follow the orange fish's movement

entered.detail: massive bright orange and gold holographic koi fish with flowing fins
tall building with curved glass facade and warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera pans upward and around to observe massive holographic fish swimming through the air between futuristic towers. A large orange koi-like hologram dominates the view as the camera turns, showcasing the cyberpunk city's advanced advertising technology against the foggy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered shadows of a city overpass into the open, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic downtown core. It begins beneath a massive curved structure that offers partial refuge from the rain, moving past pedestrians with umbrellas across wet, reflective pavement. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens onto a wide avenue dominated by the bright signage of the PETROCHEM corporate building on the right. The movement then carries the viewer across a bustling intersection where the perspective shifts upward, causing the corporate architecture to recede as a massive blue holographic fish appears to swim through the misty air. Finally, the camera pans further toward the foggy night sky, turning to reveal a giant orange koi-like hologram gliding between towering skyscrapers.
